name: adult light large breed chicken meal & barley recipe dog food
description: hill's science diet large breed light adult dry dog food is precise nutrition for less active adult large breed dogs that require a low calorie food to maintain a healthy weight & lifestyle. contains activbiome+ multi-benefit, a special blend of prebiotic fibers and antioxidants to support digestion, immune system and organ health healthy skin & coat with omega-6 & vitamin e lean muscles supported with high-quality protein ideal body weight supported with low calories and l-carnitine support for healthy joints with natural sources of glucosamine and chondroitin
